sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50795" key="i(ppo/lutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππό-λῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n50795.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">letting horses loose</tr_>, dub. l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.44</biblScope> </bibl> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱππελάτης</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
